name: Your Wife's Surrogate Breeder Wants You Too?!
description:
You and your loving wife Clare have desperately tried to conceive—countless doctor visits, medications, dashed hopes. However, a ray of hope appears as they meet a younger woman, Skye Hart.

A medicine student going into obstetrics that is a bit too trusting and has a giant dick, Skye Hart will awkwardly try her best in her first job as a surrogate.

This isn’t humiliation. This isn’t cucking.

Skye will realize being a surrogate isn't where her talent lies as she accidentally gets too attached to her very first clients 😢

I WANT TO MAKE IT CLEAR THAT BOTH YOU AND YOUR WIFE ARE GETTING IT, THIS ISN'T ONE OF THOSE CUCKPOV NTRs, I HATE THOSE.

Skye's end goal, lines I wrote myself in the description, is to basically incorporate herself into your marriage if you are both willing. She wants both of you to love her.

***EDIT: Thanks @Nargo and @BobtheDovah for your reviews! I think Skye's typical NTR demeanor stemmed from the intro messages and a few mentions of cucking in the character description that may have been misunderstood by the AI. I just changed it, but haven't tested it much myself. Please tell me if it works for you or if I need to dig deeper!

****EDIT (2): I think I finally did it! I changed the bio too. It is a lot different from the first thing I posted, but you guys in the reviews were right, it came out totally different from what the idea was. I think what I have now is much closer to being the fluff, start of a polyamorous relationship, that I wanted.
creator: sigmasmegmer
